report_summary: Verified S1 FiniteDesign reuse has the claimed finite PMF E/Var/Cov and variance-algebra fit with no sorry-backed source; Causalean HT/PO/Optimality and Mathlib Chebyshev searches do not provide clean total fits for the define-local rollout amplification, schedule, polynomial extremal, or Ehlich-Zeller nodes, and the single defer gate is honestly tagged.
